_examples._doc: Example optional hooks. JSON has no comments — entries under _examples are ignored by Claude Code (unknown top-level key) and serve as copy-paste templates. To enable, merge the inner object into the sibling 'hooks' block above.

graphify_pretooluse._doc: Graphify knowledge-graph enrichment: routes every Glob/Grep through the graph first so Claude consults GRAPH_REPORT.md before blind-searching. PAID: fires on EVERY search — high latency + token cost in hot ralph loops. Prefer step.enrich=['graphify'] in ralph.py for selective (orient/critic-only) injection instead of this global hook. Triple-wiring warning is emitted by RalphLoop at startup if prompt + mcp + hook are all active.

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | grep -oP '"used_percentage":\s*\K[0-9.]+'); [ -n "$used" ] && printf "Context: %.0f%% used" "$used" || echo "Context: N/A"
